videos.headline: Jalen Milroe finds Robbie Ouzts for a 44-yard Bama TD
videos.description: Alabama goes up 21-0 on Mercer after Robbie Ouzts scores a 44-yard receiving touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalen Milroe finds Robbie Ouzts for a 44-yard Bama TD) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama recovers a Mercer fumble on first drive of the game
videos.description: Mercer's CJ Miller fumbles on the first drive, recovered by Alabama's Damon Payne Jr. near midfield.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama recovers a Mercer fumble on first drive of the game) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ryan Williams takes off for a 29-yard Bama TD
videos.description: Ryan Williams shows off his speed with a 29-yard Alabama touchdown in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ryan Williams takes off for a 29-yard Bama TD) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ryan Williams scores his 2nd TD of the game with a 14-yard reception
videos.description: Jalen Milroe dishes to Ryan Williams for Williams' second touchdown of the first half for Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ryan Williams scores his 2nd TD of the game with a 14-yard reception) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama returns Mercer fumble for a 68-yard TD
videos.description: Alabama's Zabien Brown scoops up a fumble and goes 68 yards to the house for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama returns Mercer fumble for a 68-yard TD) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: What a grab! Kendall Harris makes an incredible one-handed TD catch for Mercer
videos.description: Whitt Newbauer airs it out 31 yards to Kendall Harris for a spectacular one-handed touchdown for Mercer.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (What a grab! Kendall Harris makes an incredible one-handed TD catch for Mercer) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jalen Milroe takes it himself for a Bama TD
videos.description: Jalen Milroe takes off out of the pocket and rushes into the end zone for an Alabama touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalen Milroe takes it himself for a Bama TD) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ty Simpson sets up a Bama TD with an incredible 43-yard play
videos.description: Ty Simpson manages to escape a tackle and goes deep to Josh Cuevas for a 43-yard reception to set up a Richard Young touchdown for Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ty Simpson sets up a Bama TD with an incredible 43-yard play) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Austin Mack finds Rico Scott in the back of the end zone for a Bama TD
videos.description: Austin Mack airs it out to Rico Scott in the back corner of the end zone for a 31-yard Alabama touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Austin Mack finds Rico Scott in the back of the end zone for a Bama TD) 2024/11/16 ESHEET
